mapper.sql: SELECT id, supplier_code, supplier_name, contact_person, contact_phone, contact_mobile, province, city, district, address, status, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag FROM sys_supplier WHERE del_flag = 0
mapper.select:
AND (supplier_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR supplier_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR contact_person LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR contact_phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR contact_mobile LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_supplier (supplier_code, supplier_name, contact_person, contact_phone, contact_mobile, province, city, district, address, status, remark, create_by, create_time) VALUES (#{supplierCode}, #{supplierName}, #{contactPerson}, #{contactPhone}, #{contactMobile}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{address}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, NOW())
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_supplier
supplier_code = #{supplierCode}, supplier_name = #{supplierName}, contact_person = #{contactPerson}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, contact_mobile = #{contactMobile}, province = #{province}, city = #{city}, district = #{district}, address = #{address}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = 0
UPDATE sys_supplier SET del_flag = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_supplier WHERE supplier_code = #{supplierCode} AND del_flag = 0 AND id != #{excludeId}
